pageContext.name: Doctor Strange
pageContext.description: I'm breaking the laws of nature. I know.   Sideshow presents the Doctor Strange Fine Art Print, a spellbinding Marvel art print by artist Greg Ruth.  The Doctor Strange Fine Art Print shows Stephen Strange clad in his scarlet Cloak of Levitation and framed by the Sanctum Sanctorum's circular window. This skilled Sorcerer Supreme wields the Time Stone, which emits waves of glowing green energy from within the Eye of Agamotto hanging around his neck. Below Doctor Strange, the villain Dormammu's realm expands in an infinite violet universe of debris and darkness.  Inspired by Scott Derrickson's Doctor Strange (2016), this original Marvel collectible is a must-have for fans of the MCU. Each Doctor Strange Fine Art Print features an embossed Sideshow logo and is hand-numbered as part of the limited edition of 300 pieces. Available as an unframed, full bleed fine art giclée print or in a custom framed presentation, this Marvel wall art makes a magical addition to any collection.  Master the mystic arts when you bring home the Doctor Strange Fine Art Print by Greg Ruth today!
